name: cosplay-map-server
description: Backend microservices for the Helsinki/Vantaa cosplay map (Cloudflare Workers + D1)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n events,places,gis -c magenta,cyan,yellow "pnpm --filter events-service exec wrangler dev --port 8787" "pnpm --filter places-service exec wrangler dev --port 8788" "pnpm --filter gis-proxy exec wrangler dev --port 8789"
scripts.migrate: pnpm --filter events-service db:migrate && pnpm --filter places-service db:migrate
